reviews.comment:
Mala predisposición de la persona encargada de limpieza de baños, la señora en el día de la fecha pretende que no ensucien el piso del baño, estando en un lugar prácticamente al lado de la playa, no permitía que entre hasta que mi calzado esté
limpio y sin arena, siendo un lugar público. La verdad, vergonzoso

(Translated by Google)
The person in charge of cleaning the restrooms was extremely uncooperative. Today, she insisted that I not leave the restroom floor dirty, even though it's practically next to the beach. She wouldn't let me in until my shoes were clean and free of sand, despite it being a public place. It was truly shameful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pOdmFHaHFXV1ZtUkhSQ2RqUmpRMnB5UW1oRGNtYxAB

reviews.comment:
La empleada que limpia los baños pretende que al salir de la playa no entremos al baño con los pies sucios, pretende que no se ensucie el piso del baño habiendo salido de la playa, cuando trabaja en un lugar público donde la gente viene después de salir de la playa. Mal servicio por parte de la limpieza de los baños.

(Translated by Google)
The employee who cleans the restrooms expects us not to enter the restroom with dirty feet after leaving the beach, and she expects the restroom floor not to get dirty after we've been on the beach, even though she works in a public place where people come after leaving the beach. Poor service from the restroom cleaning staff.

reviews.comment:
La empleada que nos atendió fue superior amable y nos asesoró respecto del servicio de control de aire de los neumáticos. YPF siempre es nuestra elección a la hora de cargar combustible.

(Translated by Google)
The employee who helped us was extremely friendly and gave us advice about the tire pressure check service. YPF is always our choice when we need to fill up.
